Key functionalities include workflow automation, user authentication, compliance management, remote access, and audit tracking. These features ensure that your team can efficiently manage tasks, maintain security and compliance, and access data from anywhere. By integrating these capabilities into a single platform, Nextcloud enhances productivity and simplifies administrative tasks, all while providing robust security measures to protect your sensitive information.
